title: The Haryana and Punjab Agricultural Universities Act, 1970
full_text: The Haryana and Punjab Agricultural Universities Act, 1970 हरियाणा और पंजाब कृषि विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1970 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 1970-16 Act Number: 16 Enactment Date: 1970-04-02 Act Year: 1970 Short Title: The Haryana and Punjab Agricultural Universities Act, 1970 Hindi Title: हरियाणा और पंजाब कृषि विश्‍वविद्यालय अधिनियम, 1970 Long Title: An Act to provide for the establishment of two independent Agricultural Universities in place of the Punjab Agricultural University constituted by the Punjab Agricultural University Act, 1961, and for matters consequential on, or connected with the establishment of those independent Agricultural Universities. Ministry: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare Department: Department of Agricultural Research and Education Enforcement Date: 02-02-1970 TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles Show all section The Haryana and Punjab Agricultural Universities Act, 1970 CHAPTER I PRELIMINARY CHAPER II ESTABLISHMENT OF CORRESPONDING UNIVERSITIES CHAPTER III MANAGEMENT OF A CORRESPONDING UNIVERSITY CHAPTER IV COLLEGES CHAPTER V SERVICES CHAPTER VI STATUTES AND REGULATIONS CHAPTER VII ACCOUNTS AND AUDIT CHAPTER VIII MISCELLANEOUS Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Dissolution of the existing University and establishment of Haryana and Punjab Agricultural Universities. Section 4. Incorporation. Section 5. Territorial limits. Section 6. Headquarters. Section 7. Objects of corresponding University. Section 8. Admission to a corresponding University. Section 9. Powers of a corresponding University. Section 10. Visitations. Section 11. Authorities and officers of a corresponding University. Section 12. Chancellor. Section 13. Constitution, powers and duties of the Board of a corresponding University. Section 14. Powers and duties of the Board. Section 15. The Vice-Chancellor. Section 16. Powers and duties of the Vice-Chancellor. Section 17. The Registrar. Section 18. Comptroller. Section 19. The Estate Officer. Section 20. Director of Student Welfare. Section 21. Deans of colleges. Section 22. The Librarian. Section 23. Academic Council. Section 24. The colleges. Section 25. Experiment Stations for research. Section 26. Agricultural Extension Education. Section 27. Retirement and other conditions of services. Section 28. Provident fund. Section 29. Appointment of salaried officers. Section 30. Temporary arrangements. Section 31. Statutes. Section 32. Statutes how made. Section 33. Regulations. Section 34. Accounts and audit. Section 35. Division of assets and liabilities. Section 36. Legal proceedings. Section 37. Transfer of employees. Section 38. Membership of corresponding University bodies. Section 39. Annual Report. Section 40. Construction of references to existing University in any document, etc. Section 41. Obligations to be discharged by the Punjab Agricultural University. Section 42. Proportion of cost to be borne by the Government of Himachal Pradesh. Section 43. Settlement of unresolved disputes. Section 44. Power to remove difficulties. Section 45. Repeals and saving.
